@@ -0,0 +1,74 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "dapr-2217-pubsub-s-deadletter-topic",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "dapr: PubSub's DeadLetter Topic",
+    "description": "PubSub's DeadLetter Topic. Requested by 21+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current dapr deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your dapr version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n dapr -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dapr\nhelm list -n dapr 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working dapr installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review dapr configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant dapr configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n dapr -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dapr\nkubectl get configmap -n dapr -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=dapr\n```\nAfter a message cannot be delivered to a subscriber (retry time out or message expiration), the message should be sent to a special topic. The subscriber can subscribe from that topic as well, or simply leave messages there to be manually verified."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for PubSub's DeadLetter Topic",
+        "description": "This is a good description of the feature. Do you think this might be important enough to be a P1?\n```yaml\n{\n  \"subscriptions\": [\n    {\n       \"topic\": \"hotels\",\n       \"callback\": \"/dapr/orders/hotels\"\n    },\n    { \n       \"topic\": \"comments\",\n       \"callback\": \"/dapr/reviews/comments\",\n       \"deadLetterTopic\": \"comments_myconsumergroup_deadletter\",\n    },\n    { \n       \"topic\": \"comments_myconsumergroup_deadletter\",\n       \"callback\": \"/dapr/reviews/comments_deadletter\",\n    }\n  ]\n}\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n dapr -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dapr\nkubectl get events -n dapr --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"PubSub's DeadLetter Topic\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This is a good description of the feature. Do you think this might be important enough to be a P1?",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "{\n  \"subscriptions\": [\n    {\n       \"topic\": \"hotels\",\n       \"callback\": \"/dapr/orders/hotels\"\n    },\n    { \n       \"topic\": \"comments\",\n       \"callback\": \"/dapr/reviews/comments\",\n       \"deadLetterTopic\": \"comments_myconsumergroup_deadletter\",\n    },\n    { \n       \"topic\": \"comments_myconsumergroup_deadletter\",\n       \"callback\": \"/dapr/reviews/comments_deadletter\",\n    }\n  ]\n}"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
